# Scrollable code block

This block is long enough to force horizontal overflow.

```typescript
export const veryLongLine = '0123456789-abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz-0123456789-abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz-0123456789-abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz-0123456789-abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz-0123456789-abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz-0123456789-abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz-0123456789-abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz';
```
